testcase.name: test_credits_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_self_edit_api.py:49: in test_credits_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Credits endpoint failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Credits endpoint failed: {"error":"Unauthorized"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_list_projects
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_self_edit_api.py:61: in test_list_projects assert response.status_code == 200, f"List projects failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: List projects failed: {"error":"Unauthorized"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_core_system_project
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_self_edit_api.py:79: in test_create_core_system_project assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create project failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create project failed: {"error":"Unauthorized — no auth session in cookies"} E assert 401 in [200, 201] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_find_core_system_project
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_self_edit_api.py:89: in test_find_core_system_project assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_self_edit_api.py:115: in test_file_diff_endpoint assert projects_response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
